prompt: A single-leaf garden gate mounted between two square posts. prompt: A double-leaf garden gate with two framed leaves meeting at the center between side posts. prompt: A pair of rectangular eyeglasses. The front frame has two lens rims joined by a bridge, and each outer corner carries a slender temple arm through a compact hinge block. The two temple arms fold inward on separate revolute hinge axes at the frame edges.
